name: companion-module-corevideo-obs
description: Bitfocus Companion module for CoreVideo OBS plugin — Zoom participant routing and meeting control

companion.name: CoreVideo OBS
companion.description: Control CoreVideo OBS plugin — join/leave Zoom meetings, assign participants to OBS sources, and monitor meeting state.
companion.author: CoreVideo
companion.help: Connect to the CoreVideo control server (default port 19870) running on the same machine as OBS Studio.
